commit.message:
Add Phase 12 plan: streamlined data pipeline with paginated API pull,… (#13)

* Add Phase 12 plan: streamlined data pipeline with paginated API pull, uniform payload format, and smart_import tool

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RMDYKKCKcxXnwFqotaiQM

* feat: Phase 12 — paginated API pull, uniform payload format, smart_import tool

WS1: Paginated API pull with 4 strategies (offset, cursor, link_header, next_url),
     SSRF checks on every page URL, and safety caps (500 pages, 50k records).

WS2: Uniform payload format — CSV batch ingestion now wraps each row as a JSON
     payload through land_webhook, giving all ingestion types the same bronze
     table schema (id, tenant_id, ingested_at, source, payload, metadata).

WS3: smart_import composite tool chains discover → infer → register entity →
     create connector → ingest → generate flatten SQL → create transform in
     one shot. Includes flatten_sql generator with PK detection heuristics.

WS4: Agent prompt updated with smart_import as primary import path, pagination
     config documentation, and simplified bronze format (single uniform format).

Tests: 17 new tests (35 total), all passing consistently. Fixed flaky test
infrastructure with conftest.py for DB backend cleanup and mock-based
CSV payload verification.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RMDYKKCKcxXnwFqotaiQM

* fix: connector delete JSON error, query workbench tenant isolation, remove seeded tenants

- Fix JSON parse error on connector delete: api.ts request() now handles
  204 No Content responses instead of always calling res.json()
- Query workbench restricted to tenant-scoped data layers only (bronze/silver/gold);
  system schemas (platform, catalogue, integrations, etc.) are blocked
- Remove seeded tenant-acme and demo users from DDL — tenants are now
  created via API or super user UI
- seed_admin_password simplified to set password on all NULL-password users

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RMDYKKCKcxXnwFqotaiQM

* fix: connectors always linked to bronze entity, collection export/import preserves settings

- create_integration now auto-creates or resolves a bronze entity when no
  entity_id is provided, ensuring every connector has a target_entity_id
- Collection export now includes entity_name, cron_schedule, and status
  for connectors alongside the redacted config
- Collection import preserves non-secret config values (url, json_path,
  pagination) by stripping only redacted "***" placeholders; re-links
  connectors to their entity by name in the target tenant

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RMDYKKCKcxXnwFqotaiQM

---------

commit.message:
Add lobby leave notification, rework Local Play, enable owner self-stats edit

Feature 1: When a player clicks "Back to Lobby" after a finished live game,
the opponent now sees "Opponent has left" and auto-closes after 2 seconds.
Uses new left_by column on ttt_live_games with Realtime subscription detection.

Feature 2: Completely reworked Local Play across Classic, Ultimate, and MEGA.
Signed-in users pick X or O side, with Guest or Rival opponent modes.
Rival mode validates username against ttt_profiles/ttt_rivals and saves
game results to the database via ttt_live_games INSERT+UPDATE trigger.
Not-signed-in users get simple text inputs for guest names.

Feature 3: League owners can now edit their own stats on the roster page.
Split the Edit Stats button from other action buttons (Promote/Demote/Warn).

feat: mandatory version enforcement — block app when below DHT minimum (v0.9.28 / v0.101.43)

Flutter shows UpdateRequiredScreen when local version < published minimum,
preventing usage of outdated builds that may have critical bugs (e.g. base58 overflow).

commit.message:
fix: critical base58_decode stack overflow corrupting SOL send recipient address (v0.9.27) [BUILD]

base58_decode() wrote a null terminator past the decoded data, causing a
stack buffer overflow when the output buffer was exactly 32 bytes (Solana
pubkeys/blockhashes). In sol_tx_send_lamports(), the blockhash decode
overwrote to_pubkey[0] (0xd1→0x00), silently sending funds to wrong address.

Fixes:
- Remove null terminator from base58_decode (binary data, not string)
- Use temp buffer in sol_rpc_get_recent_blockhash as defense-in-depth
- Fix SOL RPC params memory leak (ownership transfer to sol_rpc_call)
- Fix CLI wallet balance "Not initialized" (ensure_wallets_loaded)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix persistent yellow box-shadow on game cells by removing DOM manipulation

The onFocus handlers directly set e.target.style.boxShadow which persists
after React re-renders because React doesn't track DOM-level style changes.
The onBlur handler never fires after re-render, leaving yellow highlights
stuck on previously played cells.

Replaced with CSS :focus-visible rule on button[data-cell] for keyboard
accessibility without any DOM manipulation side effects.

commit.message:
feat: store processing metadata permanently for all workers (#527)

## Summary

- Add `processing_metadata` field to Job model — immutable provenance
data written by each worker during processing, separate from
`state_data` (mutable workflow state)
- **Critical fix**: Persist AudioShake `task_id` and `asset_id` which
were previously lost after processing, requiring costly log/API recovery
for data exports
- Each worker writes its own section: transcription (AudioShake IDs),
separation (models, timing), rendering, encoding, distribution, audio
source (ffprobe), and worker timing
- All metadata writes are non-fatal (try/except wrapped) — never fails
jobs
- Stores auth context (`auth_method`, `user_type`,
`credits_at_creation`) and search query metadata at job creation
- Uses Firestore dot-notation for atomic section updates without
overwriting other workers' data

## Changes

- **Model**: `processing_metadata` field on Job,
`update_processing_metadata` helper on JobManager
- **Workers**: lyrics, audio, screens, render_video, video — each writes
timing + worker-specific metadata
- **AudioShake**: `asset_id` now stored in `TranscriptionData.metadata`,
flows through `corrections.json`
- **API routes**: `extract_request_metadata()` accepts optional
`auth_result` for auth context; audio search stores search query
- **Firestore**: `processing_metadata` added to `SUMMARY_FIELD_PATHS`
- **Tests**: 24 tests covering model, helpers, all worker functions,
error handling, SUMMARY_FIELD_PATHS regression guard

## Test plan

- [x] 24 new unit tests all passing
- [x] All 2512 existing tests pass
- [x] CodeRabbit review — fixed timing overwrite bug (deep dot-notation)
- [ ] Deploy and verify metadata appears on new jobs via Firestore
console

@coderabbitai ignore

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: replay protection, remove read receipts, add error logging

- Replace monotonic seq replay protection with sliding window ID dedup
  (fixes cross-origin seq counter mismatch blocking all incoming messages)
- Remove read receipts feature entirely (auto-sent on open, not on read)
- Switch message status indicators from icons to text labels
  (Sending, Sent, Queued, Delivered, Failed)
- Wire retry/dismiss/sendReadReceipts props in desktop App.jsx
- Add error logging to drainInbox, fetchMessages, and handleIncoming
  (previously all errors were silently swallowed)

fix: audio toggle crash — remove side effect from React state updater

and added audioEnabledRef to track state synchronously, avoiding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Overhaul AI engine for Ultimate and MEGA modes with deeper strategic play

Ultimate: Easy uses weighted random, Medium adds meta-board awareness and
routing strategy, Hard uses 3-ply alpha-beta with enhanced evaluation, and
Unbeatable uses 4-ply iterative deepening with fork detection.

MEGA: Easy uses weighted random, Medium adds multi-level threat detection,
Hard uses 1-ply lookahead with smart move categorization, and Unbeatable
uses 2-ply phased search with progressive candidate narrowing.

Key additions: board routing scores, meta-fork detection, move ordering
for alpha-beta pruning, and requestAnimationFrame for smooth UI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix startup session gap and add systemd autostart (#2)

* Fix startup session gap and add systemd autostart

When the service starts while a streamer is already live, detect_change()
never fires a transition, leaving no StreamSession record and blocking
uploads. Now scheduled_log_stream_end auto-creates a session when the
streamer is live but no open session exists.

Also adds install/uninstall commands to service.sh for registering a
systemd unit file, so the service auto-recovers after server reboots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove obsolete start-recording/logs-recording commands

- Fix DELETE_UPLOADED_FILES default (True → False)
- Add biliup CLI backend config options
- Add recording/ sub-package to project structure

commit.message:
fix: wire up booking tools in Twilio call pipeline (#27)

* fix: wire up booking tools in Twilio call pipeline

Three bugs prevented booking tools from working in production:

1. TwiML <Stream> had no <Parameter> elements, so Twilio's MediaStream
   start event carried empty customParameters — caller/called numbers
   were always empty strings.

2. http_server.py didn't parse From from the POST body or pass it to
   build_twiml_response().

3. server.py's start event handler never called llm.configure_booking()
   — CalendarService, BookingService, and BOOKING_TOOLS were never
   imported or used. Also, system_prompt_extra was set as a dynamic
   attribute but never read in _run_sonnet.

Fixes: embed from/to as <Parameter> children in TwiML, parse and pass
both numbers in http_server, configure booking tools + append booking
instruction to system prompt in the start event handler, and properly
initialize and use system_prompt_extra in LLMOrchestrator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add integration test for full booking pipeline (mirrors production call flow)

* fix: strip bare JSON action blocks from coordinator chat display

Extract stripActionBlockFromDisplay helper that handles both fenced
and bare JSON action blocks. The LLM sometimes returns action JSON
without code fences, causing raw JSON to appear in chat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: gitignore .parallax/ debug capture directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add coverage for cloud enablement fix and action block stripping

Update cloud-status-routes test to match new behavior: apiKey alone no
longer counts as enabled. Add explicit enabled=true and enabled=false
test cases. Extract stripActionBlockFromDisplay to parse-action-block
module and add 6 tests covering fenced, bare, mixed, and no-match cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix biome formatting in electrobun windows e2e test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add cloud enablement regression test and bump git-workspace-service to 0.4.4

- Add regression test: apiKey without explicit enabled=true must NOT set
  ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED (the core fix in this PR)
- Add test: enabled=false clears stale ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED env var
- Bump git-workspace-service 0.4.3 → 0.4.4 to match orchestrator 0.3.12 peer dep

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update orchestrator version check to not hardcode minimum version

The test assumed the orchestrator would be on 2.x alpha, but we're
using 0.3.12 from npm. Changed to verify a valid semver is installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update e2e test to match actual orchestrator export name

The 0.3.12 dist exports codingAgentPlugin, not agentOrchestratorPlugin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add unit tests for orchestrator trajectory tagging logic

- readOrchestratorTrajectoryContext: 8 tests covering all guard conditions
  (null, non-object, missing ctx, wrong source, non-string decisionType,
  valid with/without optional fields)
- extractRows: 4 tests for array, {rows} wrapper, null, and non-object inputs
- computeBySource: 5 tests with mock SQL results, non-string sources, DB
  errors, and missing adapter
- Add comment on stripActionBlockFromDisplay nested JSON limitation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add comment explaining .parallax/ gitignore entry

Debug PTY capture artifacts are written here when PARALLAX_DEBUG_CAPTURE=1
is set, added in plugin-agent-orchestrator 0.3.12.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add appendLlmCall orchestrator integration test and review comments

- Test appendLlmCall with __orchestratorTrajectoryCtx: verifies source,
  purpose (decisionType), actionType (orchestrator.useModel), and metadata
  (sessionId, taskLabel) are written correctly to the trajectory SQL
- Add comment on collectPluginNames explaining why hasApiKey acts as an
  implicit cloud plugin enable signal (for RPC/services) distinct from
  the stricter inference-path check in applyCloudConfigToEnv
- Document orchestrator version history in e2e test (repurposed plugin,
  0.x under `next` tag replaces historical 2.0.0-alpha from elizaOS monorepo)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix biome formatting in trajectory test and skills marketplace test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: validate action type in stripActionBlockFromDisplay to prevent false positives

Only strip JSON blocks whose action value is in VALID_ACTIONS (respond,
escalate, ignore, complete). Prevents false-positive stripping of
unrelated JSON that happens to have an "action" field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
